user_query:
I’m preparing an internal update for our nonprofit partner on women’s preventive care trends and need your help to make it precise and concise.

Using the local files in input/, please:

1) From input/notes.md, follow the naming and significance rules for changes, including how to decide if a change is “noteworthy,” how to describe direction, and how to round.
2) From input/screening_rates.csv, compute the year-over-year change from 2022 to 2023 (in percentage points) for each indicator, determine whether each change is noteworthy per the notes, and identify the direction (increased/decreased/no change). Do not alter the original rates; use the values as recorded.

Deliverables:
A) Create output/trend_summary.csv with one row per indicator and these columns exactly: Indicator_Key, Indicator_Name, Rate_2022, Rate_2023, Change_pp_2022_to_2023, N_2023, Direction, Noteworthy (true/false). Round only the change to one decimal place, as specified in input/notes.md.
B) Edit input/brief_draft.md by replacing only the content between the markers <!-- START KEY TRENDS --> and <!-- END KEY TRENDS --> with a concise list of at most two bullets capturing the most noteworthy 2022→2023 changes (sorted by largest absolute change first) and save the result to output/updated_brief.md. Each bullet should include the preferred indicator name, the direction word, the signed change in pp in parentheses, the from–to percentages for 2022 and 2023, and the 2023 sample size (N). Leave all other sections unchanged.
C) Rewrite input/email_draft.txt into a polished note saved at output/email_polished.txt: a friendly, professional email under 120 words with a one-sentence opener and exactly two hyphen bullets summarizing the two most noteworthy changes using the preferred indicator names and the signed pp change. Reference the updated brief by its path (output/updated_brief.md). Avoid jargon. If fewer than two indicators qualify as noteworthy, include the available noteworthy item(s) and add one bullet that states the overall picture is stable.

Important: Ensure that any numbers you include in output/updated_brief.md and output/email_polished.txt exactly match the values you computed and wrote to output/trend_summary.csv so they can be cross-checked. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
